title: ZXBrick Tips & Strategy
description: Improve your ZXBrick skills with practical tips for mastering levels, using power-ups, and achieving higher scores.
summary: Small improvements in timing, control, and decision-making can make a big difference as you progress through ZXBrick.

sections.heading: Build Strong Foundations
paragraphs: Focus on smooth, controlled paddle movement before trying to play faster. Consistency is far more valuable than rushing through difficult levels.
Every completed game helps you improve your reactions and timing, so don't worry if you need to replay a level several times before moving on.
bullets: Improve one skill at a time.

sections.heading: Improve with Every Game
paragraphs: Set yourself a simple goal for each play session, whether that's completing another level, beating your highest score, or unlocking your next achievement.
Small improvements soon become bigger successes, helping you climb the leaderboards and progress through all 100 handcrafted levels.

faq.question: How can I improve my score?
faq.answer: Focus on keeping the ball in play, learning each level, and making the most of power-ups. As your control improves, higher scores will come naturally.

featureShowcases.heading: Play Smarter, Score Higher
featureShowcases.summary: Simple improvements in control and strategy can dramatically improve your performance.
body: ZXBrick rewards patience, precision, and practice. Learning how each level works, controlling the paddle accurately, and using power-ups at the right time will help you survive longer and achieve higher scores.
Whether you're aiming to complete every level or climb the leaderboards, every game is another opportunity to improve.

image.caption: Every game is another chance to improve.
